records.m_Talk_ENG: I call it..! Mutiny on board!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Do I have any dissatisfaction with our captain?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Do I have any dissatisfaction with our captain?

9n tr98~879ng Dracasia l95p m87kt ng98~87oi t87et. Nh98~ng 96e9580i khi c979ng c959 l87ii.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tallie? No. Tallie? Wait. You can't fire it indoors. Don't shoot the guy with the money bag. No, you can't shoot at the red fuel tank.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's why I decided not to hold it in anymore! I don't want to listen to anyone, and I'm gonna fire whenever I want!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The new captain? Oh...! You're right. If I beat our current captain, someone else has to take over, right? But I'm not interested in being the captain...
